title: Live updates: Israel strikes Iran, Lebanon as war spreads through Middle East
summary_full: Israel carried out fresh strikes in Iran and Lebanon on the fourth day of fighting. President Donald Trump said the military operation could take four to five weeks but has “the capability to go far longer.”
summary_public: Israel carried out fresh strikes in Iran and Lebanon on the fourth day of fighting. President Donald Trump said the military operation could take four to five weeks but has “the capability to go far longer.”
